title: Mate pigs naturally
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Mate pigs naturally demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for mating

pcs.text: Apply knowledge of relevant animal anatomy and physiology to carry out oestrus inducement and detection procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply knowledge of relevant animal anatomy and physiology to carry out oestrus inducement and detection procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply knowledge of relevant animal anatomy and physiology to carry out oestrus inducement and detection procedures.

pcs.text: Follow workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE), and select tools and other equipment applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE), and select tools and other equipment applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE), and select tools and other equipment applicable to task.

pcs.text: Ensure mating areas are secure and provide for access during joining
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure mating areas are secure and provide for access during joining?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure mating areas are secure and provide for access during joining.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for mating

elements.title: Facilitate mating

pcs.text: Use mating procedures and handling techniques that maximise welfare of pigs according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use mating procedures and handling techniques that maximise welfare of pigs according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use mating procedures and handling techniques that maximise welfare of pigs according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Supervise mating and intervene when required to maximise conception rates
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise mating and intervene when required to maximise conception rates?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise mating and intervene when required to maximise conception rates.

pcs.text: Complete mating records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete mating records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete mating records according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Facilitate mating

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
